All amounts in ₹. Fees prorated for 9 months (₹1,000 admission fee excluded from proration, added back after rounding to the nearest ₹50/100). One Time Payment = Early Bird minus one month's tuition ((Annual − ₹1,000)/9), rounded to nearest ₹50/100. Plus One follows the approved June Joiners fee structure (unchanged) — see rows marked *.
